docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-22-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-22-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF AMABEL QUIROA IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON-COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER SONIA MOTENEGRO. DEFENDANT MARTHA LARA IS PRESENT. THE SPANISH NON COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-22-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $0.00 SERVED DEC-26-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LARA, MARTHA

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $717.70 FILED BY QUIROA, AMABEL AS TO DEFENDANT LARA, MARTHA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QUIROA, AMABEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LARA, MARTHA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
